title: Same as there's "closeDocModal", is there a way to open a modal for a document?

posts.author: hwangar (Juan Arias)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have all related information ({ “id”: “monday_doc__1”, “value”: “”, “type”: “doc”, “detail”: “{"files":[{"name":"Untitled","fileId":"8383f051-f3f7-b5c7-e791-852ff6643bc4","isImage":"false","fileType":"MONDAY_DOC","objectId":6669677014,"createdAt":1716191456687,"createdBy":"33654571","linkToFile":"monday.com: Where Teams Get Work Done }”

but we’d need a way to open dialog from the objectId

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @hwangar,

As of today, it is not possible to do that, so I have turned this into a feature request

Everyone: You can vote for this at the top left corner of the topic!

Cheers,
Matias
